maximum_surface_area: Only text files and package manifests listed above. No code, configuration, or CI pipeline modifications are permitted.
constraints: Do not modify `.github/workflows` or test scripts.
Follow the exact comment structure defined in `DEEP_AUDIT.md` for `packages.x86_64` (e.g., `# Base System`, `# Desktop Environment`, `# Drivers (x86_64 specific)`).
Ensure all documentation URLs point to `https://github.com/uthsarad/NeOS` instead of `neos-project/neos`.
